Document:
# Core Rule 0 ## Players must be, and act, 16 or above to play Final Frontier.
A player's real life chronological age must be 16 years old to play the server. Secondly, you must act as you are 16, or above. Players with immature personalities can be removed with admin discretion under this rule.
Finally, if you are proven to be intentionally withholding information that a player is under 16 in Final Frontier, you may be banned under this rule.
